allow: Bash(sudo mariadb -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS warialau CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS ''warialau''@''localhost'' IDENTIFIED BY ''warialau123''; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON warialau.* TO ''warialau''@''localhost''; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;")
Bash(mariadb -u tvriuser -ppasswordku -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS warialau CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash(mariadb --socket=/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock -u root --skip-password -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS warialau CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS ''warialau''@''localhost'' IDENTIFIED BY ''warialau123''; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON warialau.* TO ''warialau''@''localhost''; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;")
